accessibility.onboarding.screen.title:
§aWelcome to Simplifium!
§aHere are the cool features the modpack has:
•§a⚡Huge performance boost
•§a☼Toggle fullbright with G and night vision with H
•§a⭐Browse beautiful shaderpacks and resourcepacks directly in-game
•§a🔍Zoom in with Z
•§a⚙Useful settings like disabling fog or displaying FPS
§aThanks for installing and supporting Simplifium!
